columns.name: FEILMELDING
columns.description: Detailed error message or description of issue

columns.name: PROGRAM
columns.description: Name of the program or module where the avvik occurred

columns.name: ANSVAR
columns.description: Person or department responsible for the issue

columns.name: SYSTEM
columns.description: Code representing the system where the avvik occurred

columns.name: TILFAKTDATO
columns.description: Date when the validation or check was performed

columns.name: ANTALL
columns.description: Number of items or units involved in the avvik

columns.name: FORSTE
columns.description: Timestamp of the first occurrence of the issue

columns.name: SISTE
columns.description: Timestamp of the last occurrence of the issue
